use_cases: Primary site-wide navigation for landing pages and marketing sites
Top navigation bar with logo, nav links, and CTA buttons
Responsive header component for web applications
E-commerce or SaaS product navigation headers
Dashboard or app header with user profile and actions
ai_summary: A header navigation component designed for website navigation bars featuring a logo area, navigation links, and call-to-action buttons. Built with Tailwind CSS and Radix UI for accessibility, this composite component supports responsive design across desktop and mobile platforms. Includes a reusable Button component with multiple variants for consistent styling throughout the navigation.
